title: SEIU Local 509 — For Stewards
description: Scraped Markdown of the SEIU Local 509 'For Stewards' resource page for worksite leaders. Covers Weingarten rights, sector-specific editable grievance forms (state workers, private-sector human services, Guidewire, higher ed), expense-reimbursement and steward-handbook resources, and steward-training offerings (Intro to Stewarding 101, Intro to Union Leadership 101, Intro to the Organizing Conversation) with a virtual training schedule and the Member Action Resource Center phone line. Authoritative reference for Local 509 steward responsibilities and tools.
notes: Authoritative: official SEIU Local 509 union content scraped from seiu509.org. Substantial trailing content is the FastAction (NGP VAN) training-signup form markup and modal boilerplate plus the gtranslate switcher; the embedded training schedule lists Apr-Jul session dates from the scrape snapshot (year not stated in those rows). Leading lines are cookie-consent chrome. No single publication date so temporal_coverage is omitted.
